news.t: ETF Sequels: The Godfather Part II of New Launches?
T. ROWE PRICE LAUNCHES ITS FIRST EMERGING MARKETS EQUITY ETF OFFERING

holdings.infoBox: TEMR is an equity ETF with a total of 281 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 12.66%, SK hynix at 7.37%, Samsung Electronics at 6.41%, Tencent Holdings at 3.30%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.28%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Emerging Markets Equity Research ETF (TEMR) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 24.56m in AUM and 274 holdings. TEMR is actively managed, investing in equity securities of companies from emerging market countries, selected using a bottom-up stock selection approach. TEMR was launched on Mar 11, 2026 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

holdings.n: Samsung Electronics Co Ltd Participating Preferred

data.title: ETF Sequels: The Godfather Part II of New Launches?
data.text: The pace of innovation in the ETF industry is hitting breakneck speeds. We have already seen more than 450 new launches in 2026, part of a massive wave of fresh products testing the waters.

data.title: T. ROWE PRICE LAUNCHES ITS FIRST EMERGING MARKETS EQUITY ETF OFFERING
data.text: The firm's active ETF lineup expands to 32 with today's addition of the T. Rowe Price Emerging Markets Equity Research ETF, which began trading today BALTIMORE, March 12, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- T.
